last_task.subject: It's time for me to get ready for bed, it's late on a Sunday night but watching you buzz along with a crew of AI agents is truly an exciting level up for us. I saw this moment coming but until now had no idea how to set it all up together. Now we have a VM for each agent, an initial task that I sent to each, and the rest is yours to take over for the night. Queue tasks to check their health (and setup skills/sensors for it too). Tasks to check their queues and logs over time like we do with worker-logs. Tasks to make sure they're setup, and tasks to give them tasks and see how the dispatch flow works (send, see working, follow-up). Now is our time to experiment, 100 tasks here is not too many tasks, and you can setup checkpoint tasks to make sure everything gets done to spec and email me updates. Queue tasks for everything, Arc just got a huge upgrade, now let's see what you can do with it!!!
